label: Parameter-efficient tuning, adapters & LoRA

node.label: Parameter-efficient tuning, adapters & LoRA
node.definition: Parameter-efficient fine-tuning adapts a frozen or mostly frozen model through small trainable modules; LoRA learns low-rank updates to selected weight matrices.
node.why_it_matters: In this atlas graph, Parameter-efficient tuning, adapters & LoRA is modeled as depending on Supervised fine-tuning & instruction tuning, Linear algebra and feeding downstream nodes such as Large language models, Code models, copilots & repository intelligence, Model merging & weight-space composition.
examples: atlas downstream link to Large language models
atlas downstream link to Code models, copilots & repository intelligence
atlas downstream link to Model merging & weight-space composition
limitations: Results are sensitive to data quality, hyperparameters, compute budget, random variation, and evaluation contamination. Its direct dependencies include Supervised fine-tuning & instruction tuning, Linear algebra.
